labels.name: douyin_get_user_info_by_sec_user_id
labels.description: 根据抖音用户 sec_user_id 获取用户资料；已知 sec_user_id 时优先使用此入口。

labels.name: douyin_get_user_info_by_profile_url
labels.description: 根据抖音主页长链接、短链接或分享文案获取用户资料。

labels.name: douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_sec_user_id
labels.description: 根据抖音用户 sec_user_id 获取该用户发布的作品列表，支持 page_token 翻页。

labels.name: douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_profile_url
labels.description: 根据抖音主页长链接、短链接或分享文案获取用户发布的作品列表，支持 page_token 翻页。

labels.name: douyin_get_user_series_by_sec_user_id
labels.description: 根据抖音用户 sec_user_id 获取该用户短剧列表，支持 page_token 翻页。

labels.name: douyin_get_user_series_by_profile_url
labels.description: 根据抖音主页长链接、短链接或分享文案获取用户短剧列表，支持 page_token 翻页。

labels.name: douyin_search_users
labels.description: 按昵称、抖音号、账号名或达人名称搜索抖音用户、账号、博主、创作者或达人，支持粉丝数量和用户类型筛选；不用于搜索作品。

labels.name: douyin_search_videos
labels.description: 按关键词搜索抖音作品；作品通常为视频，也可能包含图文内容。

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: douyin_get_video_detail_by_url, douyin_get_video_comments_by_aweme_id, douyin_get_video_comments_by_url, douyin_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id, douyin_get_user_info_by_profile_url, douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_profile_url, douyin_get_user_series_by_profile_url · Public sink: douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url, douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_aweme_id.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: douyin_get_video_detail_by_url, douyin_get_video_comments_by_aweme_id, douyin_get_video_comments_by_url, douyin_get_video_comment_replies_by_comment_id, douyin_get_user_info_by_profile_url, douyin_get_user_posted_videos_by_profile_url, douyin_get_user_series_by_profile_url · Public sink: douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_video_url, douyin_submit_video_speech_text_by_aweme_id

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
